chunks.title: Project: This Site's RAG Curator Assistant
chunks.content:
Year: April 2026.
Stack: Vercel Serverless Functions, DeepSeek API, TF-IDF keyword retrieval, JavaScript ES Modules.

Built a lightweight RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system as the in-site AI assistant for yinghanma.com. Visitors can ask natural-language questions about Yinghan's projects, research, and skills; the system retrieves the most relevant chunks from a structured knowledge base and lets DeepSeek Chat generate the answer grounded in those chunks.

The knowledge base contains 24 semantic chunks in both Chinese and English, covering profile, education, engineering projects, skills, photography practice, and personal taste (favourite writers and music). Each query uses TF-IDF (term frequency–inverse document frequency) with length normalisation; chunks matching the query language get a 10% boost.

Backend runs on Vercel Serverless. The knowledge base ships as a JSON file inside the repo — no external vector database required. Monthly cost: near zero.

A carefully tuned system prompt strictly grounds the model in retrieved chunks, preventing fabrication of emails, awards, or other critical facts. The assistant also emits frontend action instructions ([ACTION:GOTO_LAB], etc.) that let the AI drive the page — scrolling between sections, toggling dark mode.

This system is the assistant visible at the bottom-right of yinghanma.com. The fact that you're reading this reply means it just made one successful call.

chunks.title: Photography: London Combat Sports Archive
chunks.content:
Based in London since 2025, shooting boxing and MMA events on-site.

The aesthetic leans toward black-and-white film grain and high-contrast digital processing, focused less on the punch itself and more on the breath, sweat, and gaze between exchanges. Commissioned work includes gym brand content, event press, and athlete portraits.

Full archive at the /combat-gallery page.

chunks.title: Personal Taste: Literature
chunks.content:
Yinghan reads four writers most often: Dostoevsky, Yu Hua, Haruki Murakami, and Albert Camus.

The book he most often recommends is Dostoevsky's *Crime and Punishment* — because no one writes the inside of a conscience more honestly. Centuries later, the psychology still doesn't feel dated. If you want to understand what "moral dilemma from the inside" looks like, start there.

Yu Hua's *To Live* is the one he keeps returning to. Yinghan thinks the strength of that book is using the simplest possible language to carry the heaviest possible weight — almost no stylistic flourishes, and yet you can't shake it for days.

For Murakami, he recommends *Kafka on the Shore*. Dual narrative, lots of symbolism — what Yinghan likes most is that it tells you "loneliness can be gentle." Murakami is, for him, a different rhythm of thinking, the one outside engineering.

Camus is who he goes back to when he's questioning why to keep building things at all. *The Stranger* and *The Myth of Sisyphus* — that one can still choose, even after the absurd. The site's tagline "Contemplate the Absurd" comes from Camus.

If any of these interest you, Yinghan welcomes a quick email about books: yinghan.ma.mike@gmail.com.

chunks.title: Personal Taste: Music
chunks.content:
The two artists Yinghan keeps in heavy rotation are John Mayer and Ronghao Li.

John Mayer essentials: "Slow Dancing in a Burning Room", "Daughters", "Neon", "Covered in Rain". What Yinghan likes is the storytelling in his guitar — there's narrative beneath the technique, which makes it good code-at-3am music.

Ronghao Li (李荣浩) essentials: "Free Soul", "Lover", "Mountain". Yinghan thinks he's one of the few Chinese-language artists who handles arrangement, lyrics and vocals all by himself and stays internally consistent. Most of his albums quietly carry the same theme: keep living, with eyes open.

If you listen to either of them, you can tell the assistant which song is your favourite — Yinghan might reply with one of his own deeper cuts.

chunks.title: Personal Profile
chunks.content:
Yinghan Ma is an MEng Robotics & AI student at University College London (UCL), with hands-on experience in machine learning, autonomous robot navigation, embedded systems, and control theory. He co-authored and published research at DAML 2024. He is currently seeking a software engineering or AI internship to apply path-planning and LLM integration experience in a real engineering environment.

Contact: +44 7594 723656 | yinghan.ma.mike@gmail.com | yinghanma.com
GitHub: github.com/Michaelmayinghan
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/yinghan-ma

chunks.title: Education
chunks.content: University College London (UCL), London, UK — MEng in Robotics and Artificial Intelligence. Expected graduation: June 2029. The MEng is an integrated undergraduate-to-master programme covering robotics fundamentals, AI, control theory, and embedded systems.

chunks.title: Advanced Regression Framework for House Price Prediction
chunks.content:
Year: 2024. Co-authored and published at DAML 2024.
Stack: Python, XGBoost, Feature Engineering, Pandas, Scikit-learn.

Built a complete regression pipeline on a high-dimensional dataset of 1,460 samples and 81 features. Applied one-hot encoding to 43 categorical variables and normalisation to 35 numerical features, with imputation for missing values.

Reduced multicollinearity via correlation-matrix analysis using a threshold of r > 0.8. Benchmarked four algorithms head-to-head: Linear Regression, Decision Tree, Random Forest, and XGBoost.

XGBoost delivered the best results, achieving R² = 0.9143 and MSE = 6.57 × 10⁸, outperforming all baseline models. All co-authors contributed equally to the published work.

chunks.title: Autonomous Robot Navigation & AI Interaction System
chunks.content:
Year: February 2026.
Stack: Python, KD-Tree, Dijkstra, Ollama Qwen2.5, Signal Processing.

Implemented Dijkstra's algorithm with a binary min-heap (complexity O((V+E) log V)) and BFS, solving shortest-path and TSP-style multi-stop routing problems on a real-world Olympic Park map.

Built a balanced KD-Tree from scratch using recursive median-splitting. This improved nearest-neighbour query speed by 87.3% — from O(n) to O(log n) — measured empirically as 0.00522 s reduced to 0.00066 s on average.

Integrated a local LLM (Ollama Qwen2.5) for real-time natural language command parsing. The system can resolve mid-conversation intent changes from the user and trigger dynamic trajectory re-planning via Dijkstra in real time.

Processed IMU and GPS signals using trapezoidal integration and Savitzky-Golay filtering to suppress drift. Classified motion into six phases: stop, slow walk, normal, fast walk, accelerating, and turning, using empirically tuned thresholds.

chunks.title: Smart Autonomous Security Safe System
chunks.content:
Year: March 2026.
Stack: C/C++, Arduino Uno R4, UART, Embedded Systems.

Architected a dual-microcontroller master–slave system communicating over UART, decoupling the biometric authentication logic from the autonomous locomotion control of the chassis.

Integrated three sensing modalities for multi-modal threat detection: capacitive fingerprint sensing with DSP processing and 80-template storage, TF-Luna LiDAR for time-of-flight distance measurement with ±6 cm precision, and a NAU7802 24-bit ADC load cell for weight tampering detection.

Developed event-driven firmware where unauthorised access or weight tampering triggers a 2400 Hz alarm and autonomous tracked evasion. A door-timeout condition emits a softer 2 Hz reminder tone.

Engineered a worm-gear locking mechanism combined with encoder closed-loop feedback, providing high anti-back-drive torque and reliable verification of lock/unlock state.

chunks.title: Wind Turbine Pitch Control System
chunks.content:
Year: March 2026.
Stack: MATLAB, Simulink, Control Theory, State-Space Modelling.

Derived a third-order state-space model (ẋ = Ax + Bu) from first principles. The state variables capture blade pitch angle, motor angular velocity, and armature current.

Designed a lead-lag compensator that increased closed-loop bandwidth fourfold to 18.48 rad/s, while maintaining phase margin above 65° and Kv ≥ 20 to satisfy ramp steady-state error below 0.05.

Applied full state-feedback pole placement with damping ratio ζ = 0.7 and natural frequency ωn = 33.00 rad/s. Under a 10,326 V actuator saturation constraint, the peak control voltage converged at 9,815.63 V.

Achieved high-performance transient response: rise time 0.0674 s, overshoot 4.36%, and zero steady-state error. Validated robustness against model uncertainty ΔG(s) = (s+5)/20 through Bode, Nyquist, and root-locus analysis.

chunks.content:

LLM & Generative AI: Ollama, Qwen2.5, Prompt Engineering, Local LLM Deployment and Integration.

Robotics & Control: Modern Control Theory (State-Space, Pole Placement), Simulink, Signal Processing, Path Planning (Dijkstra, KD-Tree).

Hardware & Tools: Arduino, UART/I2C/SPI, LiDAR, 24-bit ADC, Git, Linux, LaTeX.

chunks.title: 项目:本网站的 RAG 智能策展助理
chunks.content:
时间:2026 年 4 月。
技术栈:Vercel Serverless Functions、DeepSeek API、TF-IDF 关键词检索、JavaScript ES Modules。

构建了一个轻量级 RAG(检索增强生成)系统,作为 yinghanma.com 的内置 AI 助理。访客可以用自然语言询问 Yinghan 的项目、研究、技能,系统会从结构化知识库中检索最相关的片段,再由 DeepSeek Chat 模型基于片段生成回答。

知识库由 24 个语义片段构成,中英文双语,涵盖个人简介、教育背景、工程项目、技能、摄影实践与个人品味(偏爱的作家、音乐)。每次查询通过 TF-IDF(词频-逆文档频率)算法 + 长度归一化进行检索,语言匹配片段额外加 10% 权重。

后端部署在 Vercel Serverless,知识库以 JSON 文件形式直接打包进代码仓库,无需依赖外部向量数据库。整体月成本接近零。

特别设计的 system prompt 严格约束模型只基于检索到的片段作答,避免编造邮箱、奖项等关键信息。同时支持前端动作指令([ACTION:GOTO_LAB] 等),AI 可以驱动网页滚动、切换深浅色模式。

这个系统本身就是访客在 yinghanma.com 右下角看到的那个 AI 助理 —— 看到此回复的过程本身就是它的一次成功调用。

chunks.title: 摄影:伦敦搏击摄影档案
chunks.content:
自 2025 年起常驻伦敦,承接拳击与综合格斗(MMA)赛事的现场拍摄。

风格上倾向于黑白胶片质感与高对比度数码处理,关注拳手在比赛间隙的呼吸、汗水与凝视瞬间——而不是单纯的击打动作。承接的项目包括拳馆品牌内容、赛事新闻摄影、运动员个人形象。

完整作品档案见 /combat-gallery 页面。

chunks.title: 个人品味:文学
chunks.content:
Yinghan 喜欢的作家有四位:陀思妥耶夫斯基、余华、村上春树、加缪。

他最常推荐陀思妥耶夫斯基的《罪与罚》——理由是这本书的人物心理写得比真实的人还要真实,几百年过去依然不过时。如果你想理解什么叫"道德困境的内部视角",从这本书开始。

余华的《活着》是另一本会反复重读的书。Yinghan 觉得它最厉害的是"用最简单的语言讲最沉的事",几乎没有任何修辞,但读完会很久缓不过来。

村上春树推荐《海边的卡夫卡》。这本书结构是双线、隐喻很多,Yinghan 喜欢它的一点是——它告诉你"孤独可以是温柔的"。村上之于他是一种独特的阅读节奏,工程之外的另一种思维方式。

加缪是他在思考"为什么要继续做事"的时候会回头读的作者。《局外人》和《西西弗神话》——荒诞之后还能选择,这件事对他很重要。网站标语"直视荒诞"就是从加缪那里来的。

如果访客对其中任何一位感兴趣,Yinghan 欢迎邮件聊聊读书感想:yinghan.ma.mike@gmail.com。

chunks.title: 个人品味:音乐
chunks.content:
Yinghan 长期循环的两位音乐人是 John Mayer 和李荣浩。

John Mayer 的代表曲目:"Slow Dancing in a Burning Room"、"Daughters"、"Neon"、"Covered in Rain"。Yinghan 喜欢他的吉他叙事——技术之外有故事感,适合在深夜写代码的时候放。

李荣浩的代表曲目:"Free Soul"、"Lover"、"Mountain"。Yinghan 觉得他是华语乐坛少数能把编曲、词、唱都做到自洽的人,几乎每张专辑都能稳定地传达某种"清醒地继续生活"的状态。

如果你也听这两位,可以在聊天里告诉 Yinghan 的助理你最喜欢哪首,他可能会给你回一首他自己的私藏推荐。

chunks.title: 项目:基于高级回归框架的房价预测研究
chunks.content:
时间:2024 年。同等贡献作者,成果发表于 DAML 2024。
技术栈:Python、XGBoost、特征工程、Pandas、Scikit-learn。

构建完整的回归预测流水线,处理含 1460 条记录、81 个特征的高维数据集。对 43 个类别变量执行独热编码,对 35 个数值特征执行标准化处理,并对缺失值进行插补。

通过相关性矩阵分析剔除相关系数 r > 0.8 的高共线性冗余特征。横向对比线性回归、决策树、随机森林与 XGBoost 四种算法的表现。

XGBoost 取得最佳结果:R² = 0.9143,MSE = 6.57 × 10⁸,超越所有基线模型。全体作者同等贡献,研究成果发表于 DAML 2024 国际会议。

chunks.title: 项目:自主机器人导航与 AI 交互系统
chunks.content:
时间:2026 年 2 月。
技术栈:Python、KD-Tree、Dijkstra、Ollama Qwen2.5、信号处理。

实现基于二叉最小堆优化的 Dijkstra 算法(时间复杂度 O((V+E) log V))以及 BFS 算法,在真实奥林匹克公园地图上解决最短路径问题与类似 TSP 的多目标巡游路径规划问题。

从零实现基于递归中位数分割的平衡 KD-Tree。最近邻查询效率从 O(n) 优化至 O(log n),实测性能提升 87.3%(平均查询时间从 0.00522 秒降至 0.00066 秒)。

集成本地大语言模型 Ollama Qwen2.5,构建语义解析流水线,能够实时识别用户指令中的意图变化(包括对话中途的意图切换),驱动 Dijkstra 算法进行动态轨迹重规划。

对 IMU 与 GPS 信号应用梯形积分与 Savitzky-Golay 滤波算法以抑制漂移;基于阈值框架,将运动状态分类为停止、慢走、正常、快走、加速、转弯六类。

chunks.title: 项目:智能自主安防保险箱系统
chunks.content:
时间:2026 年 3 月。
技术栈:C/C++、Arduino Uno R4、UART 通信、嵌入式开发。

设计主从双微控制器架构,通过 UART 串口通信实现生物识别认证逻辑与自主底盘运动控制的解耦。

集成三类传感模态实现多模态威胁感知:电容式指纹识别(DSP 处理,80 模板存储)、TF-Luna 激光雷达(飞行时间测距,精度 ±6 cm)以及 NAU7802 24 位 ADC 称重模块。

开发事件驱动型固件:非法认证或重量异常会触发 2400 Hz 高频报警并驱动履带底盘自主规避;门未关超时则发出 2 Hz 低频提醒音。

工程化设计蜗轮蜗杆锁定机构,结合电机编码器闭环反馈,提供高抗反驱力矩并可靠验证锁紧/解锁状态。

chunks.title: 项目:风力发电机桨距控制系统
chunks.content:
时间:2026 年 3 月。
技术栈:MATLAB、Simulink、控制理论、状态空间建模。

从第一性原理推导三阶状态空间模型(ẋ = Ax + Bu)。状态变量涵盖叶片桨距角、电机角速度与电枢电流三个物理量。

设计超前-滞后补偿器,将闭环带宽提升 4 倍至 18.48 rad/s,同时保持相位裕度大于 65 度,速度误差常数 Kv ≥ 20,以满足斜坡稳态误差小于 0.05 的要求。

应用全状态反馈极点配置(阻尼比 ζ = 0.7,自然频率 ωn = 33.00 rad/s)。在 10,326 V 执行器饱和约束下,峰值控制电压收敛至 9,815.63 V。

实现高性能瞬态响应:上升时间 0.0674 s,超调量 4.36%,静态增益精确为 1。通过 Bode 图、Nyquist 图与根轨迹分析,验证系统在模型不确定性 ΔG(s) = (s+5)/20 下的鲁棒稳定性。
